prompt:
Goal: Create a two-page fantasy art book spread presenting a cherry-blossom themed katana and its personified anime swordswoman, in an ornate Japanese dark-fantasy game encyclopedia style.

Canvas: Wide landscape 2:1 spread, like two adjacent parchment pages with thin black margins and gold filigree corner ornaments. Left page is bright ivory parchment with pale pink cherry blossom texture; right page is dark navy-black with gold borders, moonlit purple lighting, and sakura petals.

Left page layout: Design a weapon specification sheet for 桜霞・宵燕. At the top left place a small circular flower crest icon, then a large Japanese title with reading guide text and a short poetic subtitle beneath it. Below the intro paragraph, include a compact spec table with exactly 5 rows: type, length, blade length, weight, and materials. Add two smaller information rows for owner and special traits. The main object is a long ornate katana displayed diagonally from lower center to upper right, with a glowing icy-blue blade, dark blue wrapped handle, gold fittings, and floral engraving. Beside it show the matching scabbard, black lacquer with gold and pink sakura decoration, blue cord wrap, and antique bronze metal end fittings. Add exactly 5 weapon-detail callouts on the left-middle/lower area: 1 round tsuba guard medallion, 1 close-up of the luminous blade texture, 1 close-up of the blue diamond handle wrap, 1 close-up of the tied blue cord and scabbard fittings, and 1 bottom tradition/lore text block with a faint silhouette of pagodas and a flowering tree.

Right page layout: Create the personification page titled in Japanese as 擬人化：桜霞の剣巫・ヨイ. The central character is a full-body beautiful anime swordswoman standing in a moonlit temple garden, holding the same glowing katana downward. She has very long flowing black-purple hair with violet highlights, straight bangs, flower hair ornaments, ribbons, and drifting pink petals around her. Her face should be softly obscured or blurred while the rest of the illustration remains sharp. She wears an elaborate dark navy, black, and violet kimono-inspired battle outfit with gold embroidery, sakura motifs, layered sleeves, thigh-high black stockings, high heels, ornate waist armor and obi, and fluttering translucent fabric panels. The background contains a full moon, silhouetted Japanese roofs, stone lanterns, mist, and purple-blue night lighting.

Right page text and panels: Place a short descriptive paragraph under the title at upper left. Add a gold-framed personality/settings box near the lower left with exactly 5 bullet lines. Add a separate ability box beneath it describing a cherry-blossom slash ability. Along the far right column, include exactly 5 stacked inset cards with labels and images: 1 hair ornament close-up, 1 eye close-up, 1 clothing/obi close-up, 1 blade close-up, and 1 scabbard close-up. Each card should have a gold border, a small Japanese label, a cropped detail image, and two short lines of Japanese explanatory text.

Visual style: Highly polished gacha RPG character sheet, premium collectible weapon lore page, ornate gold UI frames, delicate sakura patterns, cinematic lighting, crisp linework, semi-realistic anime rendering, luminous blue blade effects, violet-pink petal glow, elegant typography. Keep the composition dense but readable, with the weapon page brighter and the character page dramatically darker.

Constraints: Use exactly 2 pages, exactly 5 left-page weapon callouts, exactly 5 right-side inset cards, and exactly 5 bullet lines in the personality box. Do not add logos, watermarks, modern UI buttons, or extra characters. Japanese text may be decorative but should look like a coherent fantasy encyclopedia entry.
